---
title: "When Your Customer Rep Is an Expert in Fluid Dynamics"
description: "ChatGPT moonlighting as a friendly automobile customer rep — and an expert in fluid dynamics."
author: "synesis"
date: "2023-12-16"
categories: [generative AI, ChatGPT, AI, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](cover.jpg)

![](02.jpg)
:::

When your friendly automobile customer rep is also an expert in fluid dynamics!

Source: <https://stoney.monster/@stoneymonster/111592567052438463>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_generativeai-chatgpt-activity-7141946722255028224-EwPN).*
